coach_notes: For the ASC Math Tutor and Math Tutor/Teacher roles, 'childdevelopment' and 'earlychildhoodeducation' are critical gaps because these positions often involve working with younger students who require an understanding of developmental stages to tailor math instruction effectively. Additionally, 'teamwork' and 'coaching' are essential for collaborating with other educators and providing individualized support, which are common requirements in tutoring environments. To address these gaps, consider taking a short course on child development or early childhood education, and seek volunteer opportunities that involve coaching or team-based teaching to build these skills.

jobs.title: ASC Math Tutor
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Strong alignment with math tutoring, using your algebra and calculus skills, plus classroom management and lesson planning from high school teaching.
jobs.gaps: No specific gaps; consider highlighting experience with college-level students if needed.

jobs.title: Math Tutor / Teacher
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Direct match for math tutoring/teaching, leveraging your lesson plans, assessments, and instructional materials experience.
jobs.gaps: Minor: ensure familiarity with the specific curriculum or age group if different from high school.

jobs.title: Tutor, Math
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Math tutor role aligns with your algebra and calculus skills, plus experience with lesson plans and classroom management.
jobs.gaps: No significant gaps; may need to adapt to college-level tutoring environment.

jobs.title: Science Tutor - Part Time
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Science tutoring uses your clinical experience and communication skills, and your ability to create instructional materials.
jobs.gaps: Lack of specific science teaching experience beyond clinical; may need to refresh science content knowledge.

jobs.title: Fall 2026 Instructional Design Intern
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Instructional design leverages your experience with instructional materials, assessments, and Canva, plus communication skills.
jobs.gaps: No formal instructional design experience or portfolio; need to learn ID frameworks and tools beyond Canva.
